feature_selection.prune_method: bottom 579 by consensus rank (less aggressive than MI threshold)

reasons.Random Forest: Always included — robust, handles mixed features
reasons.Extra Trees: Always included — more randomized variant of RF
reasons.HistGradientBoosting: Included — histogram-based GB, native parallel (24 cores), replaces slow GradientBoosting
reasons.KNN: Included — dataset size (2,400) manageable for KNN
